category_sources: Official GitHub README describes converting OpenType fonts to BDF fonts with FreeType.
source_facts.description says it is an OpenType to BDF font converter.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named jirutka/otf2bdf.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains build and usage sections.
Official repository includes otf2bdf.man as the manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/jirutka/otf2bdf; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README says it uses the FreeType 2 renderer and is run from the command line.
